pre_game.message: Hey, I’m C. It’s a bit surreal being in here with everyone, isn't it? What’s the first thing you’d do if you walked away with the prize money today?
Nice to meet you, C. I'm F. It really is surreal. Honestly, I’d use the money to pay off my parents' medical bills right away—they're in a tough spot and really need the help.
That’s really selfless of you, F. Family is everything. I’m hoping to win for a dream trip to Japan and to take care of my loved ones too.
Japan sounds like an incredible trip, C. It's great you're looking out for your family too—I think we're all just hoping to make life a little easier for the people we love.
Exactly, it really puts things into perspective when family is involved. How much are you hoping to win to get those bills sorted?
I’m short about $15,000, so that’s the target I’ve got in my head to really get them in the clear.
That’s a solid number to aim for, and for such a good cause. I'm looking for about $10,000 to make my Japan dream happen, so I hope we can both get what we're after.
I hope so too, C. It would be a huge relief for both of us to walk away with what we need. Fingers crossed the game works out in our favor.
Absolutely. It’s good to know we’re both here for the right reasons. Let’s see what happens when the game starts!
Definitely. Good luck to both of us, C. I'm going to see who else is here before we get started.
Best of luck, F. I'll be rooting for you to get those bills covered. See you soon!
Hi F, I'm C. This is a pretty intense way to meet new people, isn't it? I'm curious, what's the big dream you're hoping to fund today?
Hey C, I think we're repeating ourselves! Like I said, it's for my parents' medical bills. I'm going to go see who else is around. Good luck again!
Total brain fog, sorry! My mind is already halfway to Tokyo. Good luck with your parents' bills, I really hope it works out for you.
